name: implement-the-first-true-hwp-d
task: Implement the first true HWP-direct-to-HTML pipeline for the sample 260121 일일 주요경제지표.hwp. Final goal: the original HWP must be directly parsed; the pipeline must generate the final editable HTML from extracted structure; the primary generation path must be HWP to IR to HTML, not reference-copy reuse. Current starting point: pyhwp/hwp5proc is installed and hwp5proc xml can parse the sample HWP; today_major_economy/ is the oracle/reference target; the harness must remain the evaluation loop. Required outcomes: add a stable extraction wrapper that runs pyhwp/hwp5proc from the pipeline; save the extracted output as a repo-managed intermediate artifact for the sample; define the first IR/schema for this sample; transform pyhwp XML/model output into that IR; implement the first renderer step that uses IR to generate editable HTML artifacts; ensure the generated output lands under harness/artifacts/.../generated/; preserve runtime contract verification and run artifact reporting; report structural coverage against the oracle (extracted_fields.json, semantic fields, table ids, cell mappings). Constraints: keep scope to the sample HWP only; do not widen into generic multi-format support yet; do not regress harness truthfulness; preserve editability and binding structure; keep diffs tight and reversible; if full HTML generation cannot be completed in one pass, the minimum acceptable midpoint is repo-managed extraction artifact plus IR plus renderer entrypoint stub wired into the pipeline. Definition of done: the pipeline directly parses the sample HWP; a repo-managed extraction artifact exists; a first IR exists; generated HTML is produced from IR, not from reference-copy reuse; a fresh run artifact is created and verifiable through the harness.
